title: DPH Law - Structured Extract for Accounting Engine

sections.title: Predmet upravy
key_provisions: Regulates VAT on supply of goods and services in Slovakia
Applies to acquisition of goods from other EU member states
Applies to import of goods into Slovakia

sections.title: Predmet dane
key_provisions: Four categories: supply of goods, supply of services, IC acquisition, import
conditions: Must be in territory of Slovakia
Must be by taxable person acting as such

sections.title: Zdanitelna osoba
key_provisions: Any person carrying out independent economic activity
Includes legal persons, natural persons, state bodies

sections.title: Registracna povinnost
key_provisions: Mandatory registration: EUR 50,000 turnover in calendar year
Alternative threshold: EUR 62,500 from single supply in current calendar year
Registration filed within 5 working days of exceeding threshold
VAT number assigned within 10 working days (retroactively effective)
From 2025: turnover calculated per calendar year (reset Jan 1), NOT rolling 12 months
conditions: Turnover = taxable supplies in Slovakia (not exempt without deduction)
Threshold applies to domestic taxable persons only
exceptions: Persons making only exempt supplies under ss 37-39 not required to register
Voluntary registration available below threshold (s 4 ods. 2)

subsections.content: Mandatory registration when turnover exceeds EUR 50,000 in calendar year or EUR 62,500 from single supply
Voluntary registration available for persons below threshold

sections.title: Danova zaruka
key_provisions: Tax office may require security deposit: EUR 1,000 to EUR 500,000

sections.title: Registracia zahranicnej osoby
key_provisions: Foreign persons making taxable supplies in Slovakia must register
No turnover threshold for foreign persons

sections.title: Registracna povinnost pri nadobudnuti
key_provisions: Registration obligation for IC acquisition when threshold EUR 14,000 exceeded

sections.title: Registracna povinnost pri prijati sluzieb
key_provisions: Registration for any B2B service received from other EU MS (no threshold)

sections.title: Dodanie tovaru
key_provisions: Transfer of right to dispose of tangible property as owner
Includes: electricity, gas, heat, cold, water
Deemed supply: private use of business goods, gifts over EUR 17

sections.title: Rezim call-off skladu
key_provisions: Simplified treatment for goods moved to another EU MS for known customer

sections.title: Dodanie sluzieb
key_provisions: Anything that is not supply of goods
Includes transfer/assignment of rights, obligation to refrain

sections.title: Nadobudnutie tovaru z EU
key_provisions: Obtaining goods from another EU MS where goods dispatched/transported
Threshold for non-taxable persons: EUR 14,000

sections.title: Dovoz tovaru
key_provisions: Entry of goods from outside EU into Slovakia
VAT assessed by customs authorities
From July 2025: self-assessment for Authorized Economic Operators

sections.title: Miesto dodania tovaru
key_provisions: Without transport: where goods located at time of supply
With transport: where transport begins
Installation/assembly: where goods installed

sections.title: Zasielkovy predaj
key_provisions: EU-wide EUR 10,000 threshold
Above threshold: VAT in destination country
OSS/IOSS simplification available

sections.title: Miesto dodania sluzieb
key_provisions: B2B general rule: where customer established
B2C general rule: where supplier established
Special rules for immovable property, transport, events, electronic services

sections.title: Osobitne pravidla pre sluzby
key_provisions: Immovable property: where property located
Passenger transport: where transport takes place
Restaurant/catering: where performed
Short-term rental of transport: where put at disposal

sections.title: Danova povinnost pri dodani
key_provisions: General: tax point = date of supply (den dodania)
Payment before supply: tax point = date of payment for amount received
Continuous/repeated supplies: last day of period or date of payment
Construction services with acceptance protocol: date of acceptance
Invoice date is NOT the tax point
conditions: Tax point determines which VAT period the transaction belongs to

sections.title: Danova povinnost pri nadobudnuti
key_provisions: Tax point = 15th day of month following acquisition
If invoice issued before that date: tax point = invoice date

sections.title: Danova povinnost pri dovoze
key_provisions: Tax point = date when customs debt arises

sections.title: Zaklad dane pri dodani
key_provisions: Tax base = consideration received or to be received
Includes ancillary costs: packing, transport, insurance
Excludes discounts granted at time of supply
If no consideration: cost price or value of similar goods/services

sections.title: Zaklad dane pri nadobudnuti
key_provisions: Same rules as s 22 applied to IC acquisition

sections.title: Zaklad dane pri dovoze
key_provisions: Tax base = customs value + customs duty + excise duty (if applicable)

sections.title: Oprava zakladu dane
key_provisions: Adjustment when: order cancelled, goods returned, price changed
Credit note required for reductions
Relates back to original or current period depending on circumstance

sections.title: Oprava zakladu dane pri nezaplateni
key_provisions: Supplier can adjust tax base if customer does not pay within 150 days
Customer must correspondingly adjust their input deduction

sections.title: Prepocet cudzej meny a zaokruhlovanie
key_provisions: Foreign currency: ECB reference rate on day preceding tax point
Or NBS rate if ECB rate not available
Rounding to 2 decimal places

sections.title: Sadzba dane
key_provisions: Standard rate: 23% (from 2025-01-01, previously 20%)
Reduced rate: 19% for goods in Annex 7 point 1 and services in Annex 7a point 1
Reduced rate: 5% for goods in Annex 7 points 2-3 and services in Annex 7a point 2
Zero rate: exports (s 47) and IC supplies (s 43)

rate_details.applies_to: All goods and services not in Annex 7 or 7a
Goods in Annex 7 point 1, Services in Annex 7a point 1
Goods in Annex 7 points 2-3, Services in Annex 7a point 2
Exports (s 47), IC supplies to VAT-registered persons in other EU MS (s 43), international transport (s 46)

parts.title: Oslobodenie od dane bez prava na odpocitanie

sections.title: Postove sluzby
key_provisions: Universal postal services exempt

sections.title: Zdravotna starostlivost
key_provisions: Healthcare services by licensed providers
Supply of human organs, blood, human milk

sections.title: Sluzby socialnej pomoci
key_provisions: Social care services exempt

sections.title: Vzdelavacie sluzby
key_provisions: Education by accredited schools and universities
Professional training and retraining

sections.title: Poistne sluzby
key_provisions: Insurance and reinsurance services
Related services by brokers and agents

sections.title: Dodanie a najom nehnutelnosti
key_provisions: Building after 5 years from first use: exempt (option to tax available)
Land (not building land): exempt
Lease of real property: exempt (option to tax for B2B)
Building land and new buildings (< 5 years): always taxable at standard rate

sections.title: Financne sluzby
key_provisions: Credit granting and negotiation
Deposit and current account operations
Payment and transfer operations
Foreign exchange
Securities supply

parts.title: Oslobodenie od dane s pravom na odpocitanie

sections.title: Oslobodenie pri dodani tovaru do EU
key_provisions: Supply of goods dispatched to another EU MS
Customer must be VAT-registered in another MS
Must be reported in Suhrnny vykaz (EC Sales List, s 80)
conditions: Supplier must have customer VAT ID

sections.title: Trojstranny obchod
key_provisions: Simplification for three-party trade within EU

sections.title: Oslobodenie prepravnych sluzieb
key_provisions: International transport of goods and passengers

sections.title: Oslobodenie pri vyvoze
key_provisions: Supply of goods dispatched outside EU
Proof of export required (customs declaration)

sections.title: Oslobodenie pri dovoze
key_provisions: Certain imports exempt (re-imports, diplomatic, etc.)

sections.title: Odpocitanie dane platitelom
key_provisions: VAT payer may deduct input VAT on goods/services used for taxable supplies
Deduction right arises when tax becomes chargeable
Must have valid invoice
Must be for business purpose
conditions: Only registered VAT payers (s 4 or s 5) can deduct

sections.title: Pomerne odpocitanie dane
key_provisions: When goods/services used for BOTH taxable and exempt supplies
Coefficient = taxable supplies / total supplies
Calculated annually, provisional during year
Year-end adjustment required
Rounded up to 2 decimal places
exceptions: Occasional financial transactions excluded from denominator
sections.formula: coefficient = taxable_turnover / (taxable_turnover + exempt_turnover); deductible_vat = input_vat * coefficient

sections.title: Uplatnenie prava na odpocitanie
key_provisions: Exercised in VAT return for period when conditions met
If not exercised: can be claimed in any of following 12 months
Must have invoice at time of exercising
From 2025: IC acquisition deduction allowed without invoice if not received by filing deadline

sections.title: Uprava odpocitanej dane
key_provisions: If purpose changes after deduction, adjustment required
Taxable to exempt use: repay proportional VAT
Exempt to taxable use: additional deduction allowed

sections.title: Uprava odpocitanej dane pri investicnom majetku
key_provisions: Movable capital goods (EUR 1,700+): 5-year adjustment period (from 2025)
Immovable property (buildings): 20-year adjustment period (from 2025)
Annual adjustment: 1/5 or 1/20 of original deduction
Triggered by change in proportion of taxable vs exempt use

sections.title: Odpocitanie dane pri registracii
key_provisions: Input VAT deduction on existing stock and assets at time of registration

sections.title: Cestovne kancelarie
key_provisions: Margin scheme for travel services

sections.title: Umenie a zbierky
key_provisions: Margin scheme for second-hand goods, art, collectibles

sections.title: Investicne zlato
key_provisions: Investment gold exempt with option to tax

sections.title: Osobitna uprava na zaklade prijatia platby
key_provisions: Available for turnover up to EUR 100,000
Tax chargeable when payment received, not when invoice issued
Customer deduction right also shifts to payment date

sections.title: Osoby povinne platit dan
sections.title_en: Persons Liable to Pay Tax (Reverse Charge)
key_provisions: s 69 ods. 1: General rule - supplier liable to pay tax
s 69 ods. 2: Cross-border B2B services - recipient liable (self-assessment)
s 69 ods. 3: IC acquisition - acquirer liable (self-assessment)
s 69 ods. 6: Supply by foreign person in SK - domestic recipient liable
s 69 ods. 12: Domestic reverse charge for specific transactions

subsections.content: General rule: supplier is liable to pay tax
Cross-border B2B services: recipient self-assesses Slovak VAT
Foreign supplier in SK: domestic VAT payer self-assesses

domestic_reverse_charge_categories.description: Construction work CPA codes 41-43 between VAT payers
Supply of real property where supplier opted to tax (s 38)
Supply of metal waste and scrap
Integrated circuits, mobile phones, tablets, laptops

sections.title: Evidencne povinnosti
key_provisions: Records kept for 10 years
Must enable correct determination of tax

sections.title: Povinnost vyhotovit fakturu
key_provisions: Invoice required for taxable supply to another taxable person

sections.title: Nahradne udaje faktury
key_provisions: Names, VAT IDs, description, amounts, rate, date required

sections.title: Zjednodusena faktura
key_provisions: From 2025: max EUR 400 including VAT (reduced from EUR 1,000-1,600)

sections.title: Zdanovacie obdobie
key_provisions: Standard: calendar month
Quarterly: if turnover < EUR 100,000 in preceding 12 months
New registrants: monthly for first 12 months

sections.title: Danove priznanie a splatnost dane
key_provisions: Filed by 25th of month following tax period
Payment due by same date
Filed exclusively electronically
Must include total output VAT, total input VAT, net liability or excess

sections.title: Kontrolny vykaz
key_provisions: Filed with each VAT return (same deadline)
Contains detailed invoice-level data
Filed exclusively electronically

kv_section_definitions.title: Issued invoices - standard domestic supply
kv_section_definitions.description: Supplier issues invoice with VAT to domestic VAT payer

kv_section_definitions.title: Issued invoices - domestic reverse charge
kv_section_definitions.description: Supplier issues invoice without VAT under s 69 ods. 12

kv_section_definitions.title: Received invoices - self-assessment
kv_section_definitions.description: Recipient self-assesses VAT (IC acquisition, services from abroad, domestic RC)

kv_section_definitions.title: Received invoices - input VAT deduction
kv_section_definitions.description: Recipient claims deduction from domestic supplier invoice with VAT

kv_section_definitions.title: Other input documents - summarized
kv_section_definitions.description: Cash register receipts, fuel receipts, small documents without full invoice data

kv_section_definitions.title: Corrections to received invoices
kv_section_definitions.description: Credit/debit notes correcting B1/B2 invoices and simplified invoices

kv_section_definitions.title: ERP (cash register) sales
kv_section_definitions.description: Sales recorded through electronic cash register

kv_section_definitions.title: Other output without full invoice
kv_section_definitions.description: Sales to non-taxable persons, travel tickets, fuel pump documents, highway vignettes

sections.title: Nadmerny odpocet
key_provisions: If input VAT > output VAT: excess deduction
Refunded within 30 days after filing deadline
Can be carried forward to offset future liability

sections.title: Suhrnny vykaz
key_provisions: Reports IC supplies to VAT-registered persons in other EU MS
Filed monthly (or quarterly if supplies < EUR 50,000/quarter)
Deadline: 25th of month following reporting period
Contains: customer VAT ID per EU MS, total value of supplies

sections.title: Zrusenie registracie
key_provisions: Voluntary: if turnover below threshold for 12 consecutive months
Mandatory: cessation of economic activity
On deregistration: output VAT due on remaining assets/stock

annexes.title: Zoznam tovarov
annexes.title_en: List of Goods with Reduced Rates

items: Vegetables (not in 5% list), fruits, nuts, grains
Bread (not in 5% list), pasta, baked goods
Prepared and preserved foods (canned goods, instant meals)
Domestic sheep and goat meat, fresh or chilled
Domestic poultry meat, fresh or chilled
Fresh vegetables (select domestic): potatoes, carrots, onions, cabbage, tomatoes
Fresh fruit (select domestic): apples, pears, cherries, plums, strawberries
Fresh bread and basic baked goods (without additives)
Fruit juices without added sugar (100% juice)

points.title: Books and printed materials at 5% rate

items: Books and printed periodicals (advertising < 50%, erotic content < 10%)

annexes.title: Zoznam sluzieb
annexes.title_en: List of Services with Reduced Rates

items: Restaurant and catering services - serving food and non-alcoholic beverages
Note: delivery/takeaway food services at 19%, but delivery platform fee at 23%
Fitness center and gym access fees
Goods and services by social enterprises (100% profit reinvestment)

thresholds.notes: From 2025: per calendar year (not rolling 12 months)
Below this = quarterly allowed; above = monthly required

thresholds.description: Domestic reverse charge threshold for electronics
EC Sales List quarterly filing threshold
thresholds.notes: Below = quarterly allowed; above = monthly required

rate_determination_logic.description: Rate selection priority for the deterministic engine

rules.condition: Transaction is exempt with deduction (ss 43-48): export, IC supply, international transport
Goods in Annex 7 points 2-3 OR services in Annex 7a point 2
Goods in Annex 7 point 1 OR services in Annex 7a point 1
All other taxable goods and services

kv_dph_mapping.description: KV DPH section mapping for transaction types

kv_dph.deadline: 25th of month following tax period (same as VAT return)
